h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code Skills Setup (Advanced Checklist)
content.seo_description: Break through development plateaus. Master Claude Code skills setup with this advanced guide for high-velocity freelancers using Antigravity.
content.answer_block: Stop fighting boilerplate. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you move from manual coding to high-level architectural orchestration. This setup enables autonomous code generation, context-aware debugging, and rapid deployment, effectively turning your terminal into a senior-level engineering workstation that handles complex logic while you focus on client strategy and high-value deliverables.
content.intro:
You’ve been here before: the project scope creeps, the deadline looms, and you're stuck in a loop of repetitive boilerplate code. Your current workflow isn't just slow; it's a ceiling on your earning potential. Every hour spent debugging syntax is an hour you aren't shipping features that actually move the needle for your clients.

The industry is shifting, and the elite freelancers are no longer 'writing' code—they are engineering systems through AI orchestration. By mastering Claude Code, you transform your terminal into a force multiplier. This isn't just about speed; it's about shifting your role from a task-doer to an AI-powered lead architect.

steps.title: Environment Isolation & Context Mapping
steps.description: Establish a clean workspace to prevent context pollution. We define the project architecture before letting the AI touch a single file.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this project directory and generate a comprehensive 'system_architecture.md' file that outlines core dependencies, API boundaries, and data flow patterns for a scalable SaaS boilerplate.

steps.title: Configuring Claude Code for Headless Execution
steps.description: Optimize Claude Code to minimize friction during iterative development cycles by setting up persistent session rules.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a custom .claude-rules file that enforces strict type safety, modular component structure, and JSDoc documentation standards for all generated code.

steps.title: Automated Testing & Validation Loop
steps.description: Before pushing code, ensure the AI validates its own output against your existing test suite to maintain professional-grade reliability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a test-driven development workflow script that triggers the test runner automatically whenever Claude Code writes a new function.

steps.title: Refactoring Legacy Codebases
steps.description: Use Claude Code to identify technical debt and systematically refactor modules without breaking existing production features.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Identify performance bottlenecks in the current codebase and propose a refactoring plan that prioritizes modularity and clean architecture.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Refactor the user authentication module for better error handling and modularity.'

steps.title: Deployment & Production Readiness
steps.description: Automate the final push to staging or production by leveraging Claude Code to verify build integrity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a CI/CD pipeline configuration file that automates deployment to AWS Amplify and runs a smoke test suite post-deployment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npm run build && npm run deploy'

pro_tips: Always use a .claude-rules file to enforce your specific coding style; it prevents the AI from defaulting to generic, verbose patterns.
Treat your terminal session as a 'stateful' object—keep Claude Code running in a dedicated pane to maintain context across multiple file edits.
Use Antigravity to generate 'Architecture Maps' before asking Claude to write code; it prevents the AI from making structural mistakes.
If Claude Code hits a loop, explicitly command it to 'stop and explain the current reasoning' to reset its hidden chain-of-thought.
Leverage Claude Code's ability to read your git diffs; always ask it to 'review the changes in the current diff' before committing to catch edge cases.
content.next_steps: Begin by auditing your current project folder for 'stale' files, then initiate your first Claude Code session to refactor one high-traffic module.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped to build faster than 99% of the market. Don't let another project stall in the prototype phase. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
